ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Unique GUID for each device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of device (e.g., pump, valve) */,
  "assignable_device_type_id" INTEGER /* Assignable device type (e.g., critical, non-critical) */,
  "vload_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of vload (e.g., high, low) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_vload_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vload_type_id") REFERENCES vload_types ("vload_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_assignable_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignable_device_type_id") REFERENCES assignable_device_types ("assignable_device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the device type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignable_device_types" (
  "assignable_device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignable device type */,
  "assignable_device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignable device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the assignable device type */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the priority of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignable_device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vload_types" (
  "vload_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vload type */,
  "vload_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vload type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the vload type */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the threshold for the vload type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vload_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being assigned */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "unassignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was unassigned from a location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, technician) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "default" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the permission */,
  "level" INTEGER /* A numeric value indicating the level of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
